Author: raynording
Name: Dalamud ACT Compat
Description: Dalamud-side UI, storage, parser abstraction, and compatibility-host bridge for an ACT-compatible FFXIV parsing platform. This early build does not yet load FFXIV_ACT_Plugin.
Changelog: Initial development build with plugin lifecycle, Meter UI, encounter history, parser abstraction, settings, and compatibility-host boundary.
